headline: Norfolk Southern (NSC) Q2 Earnings on the Horizon: Analysts' Insights on Key Performance Measures
summary: Beyond analysts' top-and-bottom-line estimates for Norfolk Southern (NSC), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended June 2026.

headline: Grant & Eisenhofer and Poolson|Oden File Claims on Behalf of Hundreds of Railroad Workers Sickened by Decades of Toxic Exposure
summary: Claims detail Norfolk Southern's documented knowledge of hazardous conditions dating back decadesPHILADELPHIA, July 20, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Charlie Hunter, 73, gave four decades of his life to the Norfolk Southern Railway, working his way up from track laborer to foreman. He loved working for the railroad. What he didn't know — until a recent lung cancer diagnosis — was that the chemicals and conditions he worked around every day for 40 years were life-threatening, according to his legal te
